reviewer_mix: Sample Person has 4 total responses: 1 self and 3 observer responses.
overview_note: This report compares the participant self-reflection with observer reflections to identify visible fruit, encouragement others see, growth invitations, and pressure patterns.
love_summary: Love is consistently visible to both self and observers.
joy_summary: Joy appears to be developing with room for continued formation.
peace_summary: Peace is consistently visible to both self and observers.
patience_summary: Patience appears to be developing with room for continued formation.
kindness_summary: Kindness is consistently visible to both self and observers.
goodness_summary: Goodness is consistently visible to both self and observers.
faithfulness_summary: Faithfulness is consistently visible to both self and observers.
gentleness_summary: Gentleness appears to be developing with room for continued formation.
self_control_summary: Self-control appears to be developing with room for continued formation.
observer_strength_comments:
They move toward people with care and practical help.

They are dependable and choose what is right even when it costs them.

They bring peace and steadiness into stressful situations.
observer_growth_comments:
They could slow down when frustrated or overloaded.

They can carry too much and get quiet instead of asking for help.

They should keep practicing measured responses when tired.
observer_encouragement_comments:
Their care is very visible and encouraging.

Their faithfulness builds trust.

Their presence is settling and trustworthy.
self_final_reflection: I want the Holy Spirit to grow patience and self-control in this season.
